raw.message: Nottingham we're giving out FREE Whoppers ONLY on 7th April. Head to your fresh new restaurant and grab yours, while they last.

hook.summary: Text-based reveal offering a free burger in Nottingham.
hook.visual_action: Sequential appearance of text blocks and a burger image on a solid cream background.

scene_flow: Text 'NOTTINGHAM' and 'WANT A FREE' slides in on a cream background.
The word 'WHOPPER?' completes the question in a large green box.
Instructions to visit the new restaurant on 7th April appear with the Burger King logo.
A high-quality image of a Whopper burger and the specific address are revealed.
cta_text: Head to your fresh new Burger King restaurant on 7th April
audience_proxy: Local residents of Nottingham who enjoy fast food and are motivated by free promotional offers.
